description: Power user-configurable alerts with batches and channel selections.
extendedDescription: Send customizable alerts across multiple channels with intelligent batching to prevent alert fatigue. Users can configure their preferred notification channels and receive consolidated notifications for high-volume events.

description: Batch high volume comments and send out-of-app messages after delay.
extendedDescription: Efficiently handle comment notifications by batching them together and sending out-of-app messages after a configurable delay. This reduces notification noise while keeping users informed of activity.

description: Send a user invite with a delayed reminder if not accepted.
extendedDescription: Invite users to collaborate with an initial invitation followed by an automated reminder after a delay. The reminder is automatically cancelled if the invitation is accepted.

description: Passwordless authentication via magic link email.
extendedDescription: Enable secure, passwordless authentication by sending users a one-time magic link via email. Provides a seamless login experience without requiring password management.

description: Notify users when they're mentioned in comments or discussions.
extendedDescription: Keep users engaged by notifying them across in-app, email, and push channels when someone mentions them. Includes contextual information about where they were mentioned.

description: Security notification when a user's password is changed.
extendedDescription: Send immediate email notifications when account passwords are changed to alert users of potential security issues and provide peace of mind for authorized changes.

description: Celebrate when someone accepts a referral invitation.
extendedDescription: Notify referrers when their invitation is accepted with an in-app message and follow-up email. Includes a delay to only send the email if the in-app notification wasn't seen.

description: Invite new users via referral with automated reminder.
extendedDescription: Send referral invitations with a delayed reminder email after 3 days if not accepted. The reminder is automatically cancelled if the referral is accepted.

description: Batch and notify users of replies to their comments.
extendedDescription: Intelligently batch multiple replies within a 15-minute window and notify users via in-app, email, and push. Includes a 60-minute delay before out-of-app notifications to reduce noise.

description: Send password reset link via email.
extendedDescription: Enable users to securely reset their passwords by sending a time-limited reset link via email. Essential for account recovery and security workflows.

description: Welcome new users with in-app and email messages.
extendedDescription: Create a great first impression by welcoming new users with both an in-app message and email. Direct them to key resources and help them get started with your product.
